notes: Beta-candidate evidence bundle for v0.2.0-beta.1. This manifest captures the current beta proof set and remaining production gaps. It is not a production RC or production release bundle.

rc_branch_procedure.step_4: GitHub Actions triggers freeswitch-smoke.yml on rc/** branch (self-hosted runner)
rc_branch_procedure.step_5: Confirm FreeSWITCH runtime smoke status check passes on rc/v0.2.0
rc_branch_procedure.step_6: Update freeswitch_smoke_run_url with the passing run URL
rc_branch_procedure.step_7: Update ci_run_url, codeql_run_url, coverage_run_url, docker_images_run_url with rc-branch run URLs
rc_branch_procedure.step_8: Update github_release to the prerelease RC tag metadata

production_preflight: Production preflight is implemented and validated in check-config mode. A target-environment artifact is still required before RC or production promotion.
production_e2e: Self-hosted smoke run 26825030902 passed the runtime E2E path on the beta-candidate stack: tenant registration, extension create, directory and dialplan lookup, IVR lifecycle, inbound route publish, SIP REGISTER, Go agent ESL, hardening check, SIP TLS/SRTP/NAT smoke, and observability query.
production_soak: Lab soak evidence exists from enlogy@10.0.0.32 with 0% error rate and stable latency. RC-topology soak evidence still needs to be attached before production promotion.
production_slo: Runtime lookup SLO evidence exists in docs/ops/runtime-slo-evidence-2026-06-03.json and passes pnpm production:slo-check. RC-topology evidence still needs to be attached before production promotion.
restore_smoke: Restore rehearsal evidence exists in docs/ops/restore-evidence-enlogy-2026-06-02.json and passes pnpm restore:evidence-check -- --require-rc for that rehearsal artifact. RC-branch release metadata still needs to be attached before production promotion.
rate_limit_topology: Redis-backed rate limiting is implemented and pnpm production:rate-limit-check passes in dev mode. Multi-instance production topology proof is still required before production promotion.
carrier_interop: FusionPBX/NetGSM interop evidence exists in docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json with sip_register, inbound_call, outbound_call, hangup_cdr, tls_or_documented_exception, and nat_media_path recorded.
A production release still requires RC-bound carrier evidence and operator approval of any documented exceptions.
log_redaction: Log-redaction coverage is implemented and the validator passes. A candidate log artifact is still required before production promotion.
rotation_rehearsal: Runtime token rotation coverage is implemented and the validator passes. A candidate rotation rehearsal artifact is still required before production promotion.
network_config: Production network-config validation exists and must still be rerun against the promoted RC environment before production promotion.
security_review: CodeQL runs are green and the FreeSWITCH hardening check passes on the beta-candidate smoke stack. Production promotion still requires candidate-level rotation, log-redaction, and target-environment hardening artifacts.

operator_signoff.name: Fatih Kucukpetek
operator_signoff.notes: Beta candidate signoff for v0.2.0-beta.1 only.

gateway_reload.artifact: PR #179: safe gateway reload on SIP trunk PATCH, runtime_apply_requests lifecycle, Go agent ESL rescan, and REGED confirmation path.

feature_codes.artifact: PR #179: tenant-scoped feature codes with Lua callback path, publish lifecycle, and audit coverage.

call_parking.artifact: PR #179: parking_lots desired state, valet_park retrieval path, and CHANNEL_PARK event ingestion.

conferencing.artifact: PR #179: conference_rooms lifecycle, mod_conference integration, PIN enforcement, and bridge path.

self_service.artifact: PR #180: end_user role, /me/extension, /me/dnd, /me/call-forward, tenant policy gates, and isolation tests.

runtime_management.artifact: PR #180: Phase 1 read-only runtime status via Go agent snapshots and platform/tenant status endpoints. Controlled runtime actions remain deferred.

beta_gate_status.observability_hud: implemented; running-stack screenshot or test evidence still required before beta-ready promotion
beta_gate_status.webhook_signing: implemented and integration-tested; candidate CI evidence available
beta_gate_status.n8n_workflows: evidenced in beta-smoke-26845537361 with live webhook delivery proof
beta_gate_status.mcp_capability: evidenced in beta-smoke-26845537361 with live MCP tool listing and list_ivr_flows call
beta_gate_status.sdk_dry_run: evidenced in run 26845539137 with build and pack dry-run success
beta_gate_status.coverage: API 67.46%, Web 80%+, MCP 85%+ in the beta line; RC target is tracked separately
